gaps_admitted.reason: 50000 lines synthesized from ~353 base templates × tone prefix × era locale suffix. Lore depth low; mass categories (bark, combat, trade) recycle short templates.
gaps_admitted.mitigation: Phase 14 Week 4 enrichment — feed NPC personality/era richer suffix pools, consider LLM-augmented enrichment pass on subset.

gaps_admitted.reason: NPC pool filtered loosely by dialog type (e.g. trade prefers merchant/townsmen but falls back to full pool if subset empty). Lore monk could speak combat barks if era distribution dictates.
gaps_admitted.mitigation: Tighten filter_speaker_pool predicates per category; introduce 'tone' attribute on NPC for finer match.

gaps_admitted.reason: Tone prefix is dialog_id-seeded, not personality-seeded; same NPC could greet warmly in one line and curtly in another.
gaps_admitted.mitigation: Hash speaker_id into tone pick to lock NPC voice persona.

gaps_admitted.reason: audio_id mapping not populated — CMD AUDIO (Phase 15) will build.
gaps_admitted.mitigation: Defer to CMD AUDIO; dialog schema already has room for audio_id.
